---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Start daemon with '...'
3. Trigger event '...'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Verification Results / Logs
Attach relevant logs (e.g., daemon stdout/JSON log, `/tmp/zebra.log`, `ip route show`, `ip mroute show`) or command outputs demonstrating the issue.

### Alignment with Core Concept
Explain how this bug or the expected behavior relates to the core OLSR (RFC 3626) / MOLSR (draft-jacquet-olsr-molsr-00) specifications.
